meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design with AI: A Freelancer’s Guide to No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Overcome a lack of marketing expertise by leveraging AI design. Follow this expert checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-end client assets.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to scale; you need a system. By integrating AI-driven design tools with Claude Code, you can automate visual branding and landing page copy. This workflow turns technical execution into a repeatable, high-converting asset, allowing you to ship professional-grade work without traditional marketing overhead.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and the dread sets in. You’ve built a rock-solid application, but your client is asking for marketing assets that actually convert—and you’re staring at a blank canvas with zero design or marketing intuition. The gap between 'functional code' and 'marketable product' is where most freelance careers stall.

But the rules of the game have shifted. You no longer need to hire expensive agencies or spend months learning color theory. By treating design as a data-driven engineering problem, you can leverage AI to bridge that gap instantly. It’s time to stop coding in isolation and start shipping complete, market-ready experiences.

steps.title: Define the Brand Identity with AI
steps.description: Establish a consistent visual and tonal foundation. Use AI to extract a brand voice and color palette from your project requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the attached project requirements. Generate a cohesive brand identity including a primary color hex code, a secondary accent, and a 3-sentence 'brand voice' guide for all marketing copy.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a brand_config.json file based on the project requirements in the docs folder.'

steps.title: Automate Landing Page Copy
steps.description: Transform technical features into benefit-driven copy using a structured framework like AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a high-converting landing page hero section using the AIDA framework. Focus on the pain points of the user persona defined in our project scope.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create index.html with the generated copy, ensuring semantic HTML5 structure.'

steps.title: Generate UI/UX Mockups
steps.description: Translate your wireframes into high-fidelity UI components that mirror the established brand identity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate CSS/Tailwind classes for a hero section component using the colors from brand_config.json. Ensure high accessibility and mobile responsiveness.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Apply the generated Tailwind styles to the landing page components.'

steps.title: Build Dynamic Marketing Assets
steps.description: Create reusable social media graphics and banners that maintain visual consistency with your main application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a set of 5 social media post templates using SVG code. Use the brand colors and include placeholders for dynamic text overlays.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate an assets folder containing the SVG templates and a script to populate them with dynamic text.'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Perform a final check to ensure all AI-generated assets are integrated correctly and the code is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the entire codebase for consistency against the brand_config.json. Identify any design inconsistencies or broken links.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run a linting and accessibility audit on the new marketing components.'

pro_tips: Always store your brand identity in a JSON config file so you can pass it as context to any AI agent, ensuring consistent output across projects.
Use Claude Code to create custom CLI aliases for your repetitive design tasks to save hours of manual styling.
Never accept the first AI iteration; ask for 'three variations with different tonal approaches' to find the one that resonates best with the client.
Inject your own 'human' code comments into AI-generated files to make them easier to maintain for future developers.
Use AI to generate documentation for your design system, effectively turning your project into a sellable 'Productized Service' for the client.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, package your design system into a template repo. This allows you to 'clone' your marketing success onto your next client project, effectively doubling your hourly rate by reducing prep time to zero.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting a lack of marketing skills hold your freelance business hostage. Use this system to outpace the competition and deliver full-stack value from day one. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
